query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A black and white vertical photograph showing a fragment of a man’s face against a solid black background. Visible details include one eye looking toward the camera, forehead wrinkles, an eyebrow, and the upper bridge of the nose. The remainder of the face and the majority of the frame are black with no discernible detail.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white portrait employing extreme underexposure that crushes most of the frame into pure black shadow, leaving only a small portion of the man’s face visible through heavy obstruction near the frame edges. One eye stares intensely from the darkness beneath a deeply furrowed, wrinkled brow, communicating anger and menace. The severe shadow and obstructed cropping hide most of the subject’s features, generating an atmosphere of dread and unease as the face seems to emerge from an oppressive void.
